subcodes.first_line: O servant of the One! My tongue, My heart, My pen, My limbs, and My very hairs bear witness to the oneness of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبد الواحد یشهد لسانی و قلبی و قلمی و جوارحی و شعراتی بوحدانیه الله و
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
